name: search
description: Search file contents for a regex pattern. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers. Searches recursively when path is a directory. 'Find', 'locate', or 'grep' requests are tool-use tasks — use search, not memory. Use as the first step when you need to find where something is defined — e.g. search(query='def test_'). When filenames are already known, use read_file directly instead. When the task requires modifying code, follow up with read_file and edit_file — search results alone don't satisfy edit_file's read_file prerequisite.

query.description: Regex pattern to search for (extended regex).

path.description: File or directory to search in (default: current directory).
